item.title: SMC Global Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: SMC Global Securities Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Bonlon Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Bonlon Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non-Ferrous Metals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Apollo Pipes Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Strong Recent Rally
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Apollo Pipes Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. While this technical event often signals a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that warrants careful analysis. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Manaksia Aluminium Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: RDB Infrastructure and Power Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: RDB Infrastructure and Power Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and long-term weakness in the stock’s price action. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Arex Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 95.5 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Arex Industries Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 95.5 on 9 Apr 2026. This marks a 45.4% decline from its 52-week high of Rs 175, underscoring a sustained downtrend amid broader market volatility. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Sarda Energy & Minerals Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with monthly momentum indicators showing mild bearishness despite weekly signals supporting the crossover. This divergence invites a closer look at whether the golden cross stands as a reliable indicator or a lone beacon amid mixed data. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: TCI Finance Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: TCI Finance Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Kennametal India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Kennametal India Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 9 Apr 2026. While this is traditionally viewed as a bullish technical event, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a more nuanced picture that calls for careful analysis. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Precot Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: A sustained rally of over 70% in three months has propelled the 50-day moving average above the 200-day for Precot Ltd, signalling a golden cross. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with some monthly indicators showing mild bearishness despite daily and weekly bullishness. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Orosil Smiths India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Orosil Smiths India Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 09 Apr 2026. Yet, the daily price action and some technical indicators present a nuanced picture that tempers the enthusiasm around this classic bullish signal. Time: 44 minutes ago

item.title: Jindal Leasefin Q4 FY26: Micro-Cap NBFC Returns to Profitability After Five Quarters of Losses
item.description: Jindal Leasefin Ltd., a micro-cap non-banking financial company with a market capitalisation of ₹20.00 crores, reported a dramatic turnaround in Q4 FY26, posting a net profit of ₹1.18 crores after enduring five consecutive quarters of losses. The stock has responded enthusiastically to the revival, surging 73.73% over the past year and trading at ₹66.47, though the company continues to face fundamental challenges that warrant cautious optimism rather than unbridled enthusiasm. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd Reports Flat Quarterly Financial Trend Amid Mixed Performance
item.description: Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd, a notable player in the capital markets sector, has reported a flat financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, signalling a shift from its previously positive growth trajectory. Despite robust revenue growth and record quarterly profits, the company’s operating margins and certain profitability metrics have shown signs of contraction, prompting a reassessment of its financial trend and investment rating. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Slip Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends; Midcaps Show Resilience
item.description: Indian equity benchmarks ended lower on 9 April 2026, with the Sensex dropping 931.25 points (-1.20%) to close at 76,631.65 and the Nifty 50 declining 222.25 points (-0.93%) to 23,775.10. The market witnessed a divergence in sectoral trends as midcaps and small caps outperformed large caps, reflecting selective buying amid cautious investor sentiment influenced by global cues and mixed domestic data. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.76% on 9 April 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood. While heavyweight stocks such as Tata Steel and NTPC showed signs of mild bullishness, the broader index was weighed down by a majority of declining stocks, highlighting a divergence between defensive and cyclical sectors. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shows Mixed Momentum Amid Selective Stock Upgrades
item.description: The small-cap segment, as represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has demonstrated modest gains in recent trading sessions, reflecting a cautious but positive investor sentiment. Despite a mixed breadth with more decliners than advancers, the segment has outperformed many broader market peers over the past week, driven by select high-return stocks and technical upgrades. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Edges Higher Amid Mixed Breadth and Sectoral Divergence
item.description: The BSE MIDCAP 150 index recorded a modest gain of 0.09% on 9 Apr 2026, continuing its steady upward trajectory with a 5.44% rise over the past five trading sessions. Despite the slight daily advance, the mid-cap segment displayed a mixed breadth with 68 stocks advancing against 82 decliners, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid upcoming corporate earnings announcements. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Vadilal Enterprises Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Vadilal Enterprises Ltd’s share price declined sharply on 09 Apr 2026, touching a new 52-week low of Rs.9450. This marks a significant drop for the FMCG company, reflecting ongoing pressures amid broader market weakness and company-specific factors. Time: 3 hours ago
